zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Béatrix de Posquières於1080年出生在法國藍多-盧希隆加爾尼斯武茲斯時，她的父親Rostaing Ier de Posquières60歲，母親Ermessinde de Trancavel47歲。她於大約1110年與Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1140年在法國奧其坦尼加爾武茲斯享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Béatrix de Posquières于1080年出生在法国藍多-盧希隆加爾尼斯武茲斯时，她的父亲Rostaing Ier de Posquières60岁，母亲Ermessinde de Trancavel47岁。她于大约1110年与Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1140年在法国奧其坦尼加爾武茲斯享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

nameMeanings.name: Béatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Béatrix de Posquières was born in 1080, in Uzès, Nîmes, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, her father, Rostaing Ier de Posquières, was 60 and her mother, Ermessinde de Trancavel, was 47. She married Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières about 1110. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1140, in Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Béatrix de Posquières est née en 1080, à Uzès, Nîmes, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, son père, Rostaing Ier de Posquières, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Ermessinde de Trancavel, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières environ 1110. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1140, à Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Béatrix de Posquières 1080 in Uzès, Nîmes, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rostaing Ier de Posquières 60 und ihre Mutter Ermessinde de Trancavel 47. Sie hat um 1110 Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1140 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Béatrix de Posquières è nata il nel 1080 nel Uzès, Nîmes, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, sua padre, Rostaing Ier de Posquières, aveva 60 anni e sua madre, Ermessinde de Trancavel, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières circa 1110. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1140, nel Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Béatrix de Posquièresが1080年にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンガードンiメスウズeスで生まれた時，父Rostaing Ier de Posquièresは60歳，母Ermessinde de Trancavelは47歳であった。約1110年にRaymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquièresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1140年にフランスオクシタニーガードウズeスで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Béatrix de Posquières(이)가 1080년 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 가드 i메스 즈e스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rostaing Ier de Posquières(은)는 60세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermessinde de Trancavel(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 대략 1110년 Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1140년 프랑스 옥시탠이 가드 즈e스에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Béatrix de Posquières nasceu em 1080, em Uzès, Nîmes, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, seu pai, Rostaing Ier de Posquières, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Ermessinde de Trancavel, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières aproximadamente 1110. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1140, em Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Béatrix de Posquières родилась в 1080 г. в местности узeс, нiмесь, гард, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция, её отцу по имени Rostaing Ier de Posquières было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermessinde de Trancavel, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières около 1110 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1140 г. в местности узeс, гард, окситани, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Béatrix de Posquières nació en 1080, en Uzès, Nîmes, Gard, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, su papá, Rostaing Ier de Posquières, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Ermessinde de Trancavel, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Raymond Décan II d'Avignon d'Uzès de Posquières aproximadamente 1110. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1140, en Uzès, Gard, Occitanie, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
